---
title: "Rural Broadband Adoption Over Time"
description: "Trend chart of FCC broadband adoption in rural counties, 2019–2024"
author: "CORI Data Team"
date: "2026-04-20"
categories: ["Chart", "Broadband"]
tags: ["FCC", "Adoption", "Time Series"]
chart:
  title: "Rural Broadband Adoption Over Time"
  chartType: "line"
  interactive: false
  dataSource: "FCC National Broadband Map"
  sourceUrl: "https://broadbandmap.fcc.gov/"
  featured: true
usesDatasets: ["fcc-broadband"]
usesPackages: ["cori-data-fcc"]
producedBy: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This placeholder chart tracks FCC-reported broadband adoption rates in rural counties
from 2019 through 2024. It will be replaced by S3-sourced content during the pre-build
pipeline once the S3 integration is implemented.

::: callout-note
This is a placeholder. Real chart content will be sourced from S3 at build time.
:::
